summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Al-Cazar Fort hotel website clone. All backend APIs working perfectly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with all pages, navigation, forms, and interactive features working correctly. One minor UI issue found with hero slider dots z-index.

ui_bugs.issue: Slider dots have z-index/overlay issue - booking widget or navbar intercepts clicks on dots
ui_bugs.workaround: Slider still fully functional via next/prev buttons and auto-rotation (6s interval)

passed_tests: Backend: Root endpoint (GET /api/) returns correct response
Backend: List rooms (GET /api/rooms) returns 3 rooms
Backend: Get room by slug (GET /api/rooms/{slug}) for all 3 rooms
Backend: Invalid room slug returns 404
Backend: Availability check (POST /api/availability) works
Backend: Create booking (POST /api/bookings) works
Backend: List bookings (GET /api/bookings) works
Backend: Create contact message (POST /api/contact) works
Backend: List testimonials (GET /api/testimonials) returns 5 testimonials
Frontend: Home page loads with hero slider, booking widget, about, facilities, rooms, amenities, gallery, testimonials sections
Frontend: Navigation to all pages (Home, About, Rooms, Restaurant, Activities, Gallery, Contact, Booking) works
Frontend: Hero slider next/prev buttons work
Frontend: Hero slider auto-rotation works (6s interval)
Frontend: Booking widget fills dates and navigates to /booking with query params
Frontend: Rooms list page displays all 3 room types
Frontend: All 3 room detail pages load with gallery, description, features, book button
Frontend: Room detail book button navigates to booking page
Frontend: Gallery page displays 24+ images
Frontend: Gallery lightbox opens, next/prev navigation works, close works
Frontend: Contact form submission posts to API and shows success toast
Frontend: Booking form submission posts to API and shows success toast
Frontend: Footer displays with logo, quick links, room links, contact info
Frontend: WhatsApp floating button present
Frontend: 404 page renders for invalid routes

success_percentage.frontend: 99% (1 minor UI issue with slider dots clickability, all functionality works)

action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix hero slider dots z-index issue - add higher z-index to .hero-dots class or adjust booking widget positioning to prevent overlay interception. Slider is fully functional via next/prev buttons and auto-rotation, so this is a LOW priority cosmetic fix.
